name: brainrot-rumble
description: Brainrot Rumble — mobile bullet-hell survivor (web + Android)

scripts.cap:sync: npm run icons && npm run prepare:www && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.postinstall: npm run icons && npm run prepare:www
